positive: A maximalist, highly stylized forest scene featuring enchanted bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central composition showcasing giant, stylized glowing mushrooms and gracefully flowing vines. Include abstract celestial elements, such as crescent moon fragments and nebula clouds, interwoven with deep forest foliage. The color palette should be a dramatic jewel-tone contrast of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, iridescent purples, and pops of glowing cyan. Use a silhouette and linework style combined with flat, vibrant coloring, highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Perfect symmetry, intricate detail, clean edges, fantasy illustration style, high contrast, symmetrical composition, vector art aesthetic.
